title: Output, production, and household income
description: Real GDP per capita, industrial production, and real median household income can follow different paths even when headline output grows.
plainLanguageSummary: Real GDP per capita, industrial production, and real median household income can follow different paths even when headline output grows.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Official real GDP per capita, industrial-production index, and annual real median household income; no monthly or quarterly interpolation is applied to annual income.
calculation.explanation: The measures differ in concept, population adjustment, frequency, and revisions. Indexed paths compare relative growth rather than levels.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: The measures differ in concept, population adjustment, frequency, and revisions. Indexed paths compare relative growth rather than levels.

methodology.formula: Official real GDP per capita, industrial-production index, and annual real median household income; no monthly or quarterly interpolation is applied to annual income.
methodology.notes: The measures differ in concept, population adjustment, frequency, and revisions. Indexed paths compare relative growth rather than levels.
